3. cooperation (noun) - "Cooperation is teamwork." German: "Kooperation ist Teamwork." Japanese: "協力はチームワークだ。" Chinese: "合作是团队协作。"

Alternatively use "Copy" as verb? But noun is more straightforward. I'll use "A copy is a reproduction."

10. coral (noun) - "Coral is an animal." Or "Coral is a marine organism." Since coral is a living thing. "Coral is a marine animal." German: "Koralle ist ein Meerestier." Japanese: "サンゴは海洋生物だ。" Chinese: "珊瑚是海洋动物。"
